mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role (role_name, data_scope, remark, status, authority, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{roleName}, #{dataScope}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{authority}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM role WHERE role_name = #{roleName} LIMIT 1
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM role WHERE role_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM role WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.phone, d.dept_name AS deptName, u.status, u.create_time AS createTime FROM user_role ur JOIN user u ON ur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY u.create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
